title: impatiens marlothiana
intro: Impatiens marlothiana, commonly known as the sticky nut weed or sticky nut senna, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Impatiens marlothiana include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as a laxative. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, the seeds are used to make a decoction for medicinal purposes.
